{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211411296DB7990AF52687C06506"}"},"total":27},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580664617154446104","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然只看到三十的章，开头淡淡的幽忧到精神的情绪表达很明显，真的很喜欢作者的描写，因为上本重组，爱上了作者的情绪，心理，述事描写，真的很舒适，期待后续"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765014318,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6IyoyB8ugxIJ72qH1SOD8GEbJbDXzrAe+oRzVQITuS+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1ae3c01de16f45b0be8f6b91d0de1747~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623954&x-signature=015xNN0d5CXBpjN1dwQ3QJjrQLg%3D","user_id":"1515581054389118","user_name":"哟哟哟切克闹耶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1515581054389118","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】
这座城市病了，脱下警服的刑警大队队长何言也病了。因师父去世愤然离开警队，又接连遭遇母亲去世，患上躁郁症导致家庭破裂，何言的人生彻底陷入了低谷。在发小的提议下，何言与其成立咨询公司，将丰富的刑侦经验、躁郁症带来的复杂情绪全部投入调查工作。何言本以为自己这辈子就会这样过下去，却在调查中卷入了一系列复杂的案件：冒名顶替、交换杀人、直播求救……每一个看似偶然的背后都是犯罪者的疯狂，何言赌上残存的理智，在躁郁症与破碎人生的夹缝中点燃最后一盏希望之灯。真相为何？迷雾终散！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空城","author_id":"","book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_name":"疯探","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082038","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548366150267046974","read_count":"1429","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"465296"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"94","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0376a037b2f0582dce53820d08f0e889~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257489&x-signature=8RIyC1lK%2BcBbl%2BDo7ZoYKcitm7M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"54"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211411296DB7990AF52687C06506"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":20593,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21255,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1645},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595604030124213016","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体而言，整本书感情细腻，案件故事也不错。不过从第一人称视角看案件，加上大篇幅对“我”情绪的描述，跟以往的刑侦类有了较大的区别。作者对双相的病情描述，用笔较多，看到后面，略有反感，总觉得用词相似度太高了。也许是这病本身就是这么简单的反复而已。","text_exts":[{"e":28,"s":24,"text":"第一人称","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%BA%BA%E7%A7%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407348987C06506%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227595604030124213016%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227548366074085919769%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%BA%BA%E7%A7%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768491935,"group_id":"7548366074085919769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzFI0V4at0ohlgKtFkfSaBc1CQGCfe3dusx+M/UyW5/H","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2066713607408333","user_name":"喜欢鲣鸟的方雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2066713607408333","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548366074085919769","book_info":{"abstract":"【在这个颠倒的城市中，有人像疯子一样追求真相！】
